entry.title: Atom Entry With ID
entry.content: An Atom entry may carry its own HTML content. The sync service should map that content into Reader blocks and preserve the explicit Atom id as the guid for de-duplication.

entry.title: Atom Entry With Link Identity
entry.summary: This entry omits atom:id, so the alternate link becomes the guid. The body is a short summary and should remain readable in the library.

entry.title: Atom Entry With Hashed Identity
entry.summary: This entry has neither id nor link. The fallback guid is a stable hash derived from title and published date.
